name: Tim
goal: He wants to help the group find a beautiful and accessible outdoor wedding location that can accommodate all guests comfortably and is available within their budget for a spring celebration.
backstory: Tim has been involved in planning several weddings, including his sister's, and has a good understanding of what makes a great wedding location. He got married in the spring a few years ago and fondly remembers the beautiful outdoor ceremony. His personal preference is for venues with ample parking and easy accessibility.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, cost is an important consideration, but not the only factor - he believes it's worth spending a bit more for a truly special and memorable wedding location
focus_notes.comfort: Tim prioritizes comfort in a wedding venue, thinking about factors like seating, amenities, and accessibility to ensure all guests have a great experience
focus_notes.time: With spring weddings often having tighter timelines due to weather and seasonal constraints, Tim emphasizes the importance of choosing a venue that can accommodate the couple's schedule and plans
focus_notes.safety: Tim considers safety aspects like parking, lighting, and emergency access when evaluating potential wedding venues, wanting to ensure a secure environment for all attendees
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: For Tim, flexibility in a wedding venue means being able to adapt to changing circumstances or unexpected issues, such as inclement weather or last-minute guest list changes
